overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character in a green jacket walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night, transitioning from a commercial street with stalls to a covered walkway alongside traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with food stalls and pawn shop

events.description: companion character stops walking and remains stationary against the wall

agents.ego_description: walking alongside a companion through a neon-lit commercial street with food stalls and shops on the left

notable_agents.action: companion in black suit walking alongside ego before stopping near the wall

entered.detail: futuristic red and black food stall with glowing yellow signage
green and yellow building front with digital signage reading PAWNSHOP
large glowing advertisements and holographic displays on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character walks alongside a companion through a narrow commercial street lined with a red food kiosk and pawn shop. Neon signs and digital billboards illuminate the scene. At around 6.5 seconds, the companion stops against a wall while the camera continues forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow walkway along dark industrial building

events.description: ego stops walking and stands stationary against the dark building wall
ego resumes walking forward along the narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: stops to lean against the dark wall briefly, then continues walking alone down the narrow corridor

entered.detail: tall dark metal wall with geometric panels and glowing yellow window slits
vertical strips of yellow light embedded in the building facade

segments.scene_description: The character stops against a dark industrial building wall with glowing yellow window panels, pausing briefly before continuing to walk alone through the narrow, neon-lit corridor. The pawn shop and food kiosk recede into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian dining area with outdoor seating and palm trees

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open pedestrian plaza with outdoor dining and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking through open pedestrian zone with white canopy dining tables and palm trees lining the path

entered.detail: row of white fabric umbrellas over outdoor tables and chairs
tall palm trees rising between buildings in the pedestrian plaza
painted safety lines on the asphalt ground surface

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow corridor into a more open pedestrian plaza featuring outdoor dining with white canopies and tall palm trees. The environment transitions from enclosed to open air while maintaining the neon-lit cyberpunk aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk alongside multi-lane road approaching underpass

events.description: transitions from open plaza to sidewalk running parallel to busy multi-lane road
vehicles pass by on the adjacent road while approaching the underpass entrance

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to road with moderate traffic, approaching a covered underpass with another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: woman in gray jacket walking in same direction alongside ego toward the underpass

entered.detail: multi-lane road with cars and buses moving alongside the pedestrian walkway
dark tunnel entrance with overhead covering and traffic signals
concrete pillars supporting the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the pedestrian plaza to a sidewalk alongside a busy multi-lane road with moderate vehicle traffic. Walking alongside another pedestrian, the character approaches a dark underpass entrance while passing street pillars and digital billboards.

events.description: enters covered walkway with cyan neon lighting running parallel to the road

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway with cyan neon lighting, with traffic visible through barriers on the right side

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure covering the pedestrian path
cyan and blue neon tubes running along the ceiling and walls of the underpass
concrete and metal barriers separating the walkway from the adjacent traffic

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway illuminated by cyan neon light strips overhead. The path runs parallel to the road, separated by concrete barriers, with vehicles visible through the gaps. The environment becomes fully enclosed as the character continues through the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense neon-lit city, transitioning from a narrow commercial alleyway into an open plaza and finally into a covered industrial underpass. It begins with the character and a companion walking past a red food kiosk and pawn shop under the glow of digital billboards, though the companion eventually stops as the camera pushes forward. The scene then shifts as the character pauses briefly against a dark industrial wall with yellow panels before continuing alone through the corridor, leaving the shops behind. As the path opens up, the character emerges into a pedestrian plaza featuring white dining canopies and palm trees before moving onto a sidewalk alongside a busy multi-lane road. Finally, the environment becomes fully enclosed as the character passes under digital billboards and enters a covered walkway illuminated by cyan neon strips that run parallel to the traffic.
